case_title: ROBERT L. MCCURN VS. KH PLUMBING SUPPLY, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPPEAR HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT NAVIEN INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCURN, ROBERT L. AS TO DEFENDANT NAVIEN INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT-NAVIEN INC)**GRANTED** -UNTIMELY BY 1 DAY
REMARK:DEFENDANTS NAVIEN INC EXHIBITS RECIEVED BY MAIL.
ORDER TO CONTINUE: PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE FOR A JPT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TIM HON, OWNER. FILED BY DEFENDANT KH PLUMBING SUPPLY, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2023 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCURN, ROBERT L. AS TO DEFENDANT KH PLUMBING SUPPLY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-08-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ROBERT L. MCCURN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KH PLUMBING SUPPLY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NAVIEN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA REYES VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE FOR A JUDGE PRO TEM. DEFENDANT NAVIEN, INC'S REQUEST TO APPEAR VIA ZOOM IS EXTENDED TO THE NEXT HEARING. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) VERONICA REYES, LEAD CLAIMS COORDINATOR. FILED BY DEFENDANT NAVIEN INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT NAVIEN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MCCURN, ROBERT L. AS TO DEFENDANT KH PLUMBING SUPPLY, INC. NAVIEN INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SEE SIGNATURE ON GREEN CARD** SERVED OCT-13-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KH PLUMBING SUPPLY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-08-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-08-2023 BY JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF ROBERT L. MCCURN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KH PLUMBING SUPPLY, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TIM HON (OWNER). DEFENDANT NAVIEN INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY VERONICA REYES VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT NAVIEN INC EMAILS SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FORM TO DEPT 506 BY EMAIL. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; DEPUTY OBTINALLA; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-13-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NAVIEN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCURN, ROBERT L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAVIEN INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.00, NAVIEN, INC ONLY. KH PLUMBING SUPPLY, INC IS NOT LIABLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
